hero.headline: Your ops outgrew your tools. We fix that.
hero.subtext: We partner with growing teams to fix broken systems and build ones that actually hold up — practical, independent, and built for real use, so your team can focus on what they do best.
hero.trustBadge: Trusted by operations leaders across North America

whoWeHelp.title: Who We Help
whoWeHelp.subtitle: We work with growing companies where the way the business runs has outpaced the systems supporting it.

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: Production, inventory, and finance don't line up — and you're stuck stitching systems together just to keep things moving.

distribution.title: Distribution & Logistics
distribution.description: Orders, warehouse ops, and carrier integrations are disconnected — creating constant workarounds and missed visibility.

industrial.title: Industrial Services
industrial.description: Field teams are running on spreadsheets and disconnected tools — and it's starting to break as you scale.

other.title: Other Growing Operations
other.description: Any growing business where systems haven't kept up — and your team is compensating with manual work, workarounds, or extra hires.

differentiators.title: Why Us
differentiators.subtitle: We're not a big-four consulting firm. We're operators who've been in the weeds and built the systems to get out.

items.title: Work with operators, not consultants
items.description: We've been responsible for how the business actually runs — across systems, workflows, and day-to-day operations. That's why we build systems that actually work in the real world.

items.title: Independent by design
items.description: Technology should serve your operations, not the other way around. We're not tied to vendors or platforms — every recommendation is based on your business, not someone else's agenda.

items.title: Take the load off your team
items.description: Your team shouldn't have to become system experts just to keep things running. We handle the heavy lifting so they can stay focused on the business.

items.title: Owner-led, start to finish
items.description: You work directly with the owners from start to finish — no handoffs. We keep our client list small, so you get focused attention, faster decisions, and real accountability.

process.title: How We Work
process.ctaButton: Start with a Free Systems Health Check
process.subtitle: Four steps. Start anywhere. We'll meet you where you are and take you as far as you need.

steps.title: Systems Health Check
steps.description: We quickly understand how your team works, the tools you use, and where things break down. You'll leave with clear issues, cost-saving opportunities, and a plan for what to fix first.

steps.title: Solution Design
steps.description: We work with you to translate what we found into a clear plan — defining requirements, selecting the right tools, working with software companies, and mapping the path to implementation.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.description: We work with you to bring the plan to life — handling as much or as little as you need, from system configuration to integrations and project management.

steps.title: Support & Optimization
steps.description: We stick with you — staying involved as much as you need, providing support, making improvements, and helping your systems evolve as your business grows.

solutions.title: Solutions
solutions.subtitle: Every engagement starts with a deep understanding of your operations. Here are the most common problems we solve.

aiOperations.title: AI Operations & RAG Enablement
aiOperations.description: We help growing teams deploy RAG assistants, workflow agents, and AI copilots on top of stable systems, governed data, and real operational use cases.

opsOutgrown.title: Ops Outgrown Your Tools
opsOutgrown.description: Your business has scaled but your systems haven't kept up. We design and implement the infrastructure your next stage of growth demands.

spreadsheetOps.title: Spreadsheet Operations
spreadsheetOps.description: Running your company on Excel is a liability. We replace spreadsheet-dependent processes with reliable, scalable systems.

systemIntegration.title: System Integration
systemIntegration.description: Disconnected systems create manual work, errors, and blind spots. We connect your tools so data flows automatically where it needs to go.

erpImplementation.title: ERP Implementation
erpImplementation.description: Without a strong operational lens, ERP projects can miss the mark. That's where we come in — selecting, configuring, and implementing an ERP that actually fits your operations.

crmImplementation.title: CRM Implementation
crmImplementation.description: Your sales team needs more than a contact database. We implement CRMs that give your team pipeline visibility, forecasting, and actionable data.

apiIntegrations.title: API Integrations
apiIntegrations.description: Manual data transfer between systems is a productivity tax. We build the integrations that eliminate re-keying, reduce errors, and save hours every week.

customApiDevelopment.title: Custom API Development
customApiDevelopment.description: When native connectors are not enough, we build the middleware, endpoints, and integration logic your operation actually needs.

ecommerceDevelopment.title: Ecommerce Development
ecommerceDevelopment.description: We build ecommerce systems that work across storefront, fulfillment, inventory, ERP, CRM, and the operational realities behind them.

vendorManagement.title: Software Selection
vendorManagement.description: Choosing the wrong software is expensive. We run a structured selection process so you choose the right tool for your specific operations.

systemsAudit.title: Systems Health Check
systemsAudit.description: Don't know where to start? Our systems health check gives you a complete map of your operational tech stack, gaps, and a prioritized roadmap for improvement.

mobileWarehouse.title: Mobile Warehouse & Barcoding
mobileWarehouse.description: Manual processes, paper picking, and delayed updates create inventory inaccuracies and operational friction. A mobile warehouse solution enables real-time data capture integrated with your ERP.

projectManagement.title: Project Management
projectManagement.description: Software projects often stall — not because of the technology, but because there's no internal resource to drive them. We step in to keep everything aligned, accountable, and moving forward.

processFoundations.title: Operational Process & System Foundations
processFoundations.description: Sometimes the issue isn't your system — it's how it's being used. We help you get the fundamentals right so your operations run the way they should.

supportHome.title: Support After Go-Live
supportHome.subtitle: We do not only deliver projects. We also support live systems, take over from weak providers, and help teams keep improving after launch.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Operator-led post-launch support for the systems already running your business. Stabilization, maintenance, change requests, provider replacement, and ongoing improvement.

insights.title: Operational Insights
insights.subtitle: Practical guidance from operators who've been in the weeds.
insights.noPosts: No posts yet. Check back soon.

hero.headline: Built by operators, for operators.
hero.subtext: Awesoon means "easy" in Persian. We chose that name deliberately — because running operations should feel that way. We started Awesoon after living the opposite: managing growth at real companies where the systems fought you at every turn. We built this practice to change that.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To make operations easy — not in a naive way, but in the way that comes from having the right systems, the right data, and the right processes working together. We give growing teams the connected infrastructure they need to grow without the chaos, without bloated consulting fees, and without cookie-cutter solutions that don't fit.

items.title: Honesty over polish
items.description: We'll tell you what we actually think, not what sounds good in a slide deck.

items.title: Implementation over advice
items.description: Recommendations are worth nothing if they're never executed. We build it with you.

items.title: Right-fit over best-in-class
items.description: The best system for you is the one your team will actually use. We optimize for adoption.

items.title: Long-term over quick wins
items.description: We design for where your business is going, not just where it is today.

team.title: The Team
team.subtitle: Two operators who've been in the weeds — and built systems to get out.

cta.headline: Operations should feel easy. Let's get you there.
cta.subtext: Start with a free systems health check. No pitch deck, no sales pressure — just a clear-eyed look at where your operations stand and what it would take to make them work the way they should.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.subtitle: Tell us what’s breaking, growing, or getting stuck. We’ll help you find the right next move.

fields.problems: What are your biggest operational challenges?
fields.timeline: When are you looking to start?

footer.tagline: Awesoon means easy. That's what operations should feel like.
footer.readyHeadline: Ready for operations that actually feel easy?
footer.readySubtext: A 30-minute call. No pitch deck. Just an honest look at your systems and a clear path forward.
footer.humanReplies: A real person replies within 24 hours.
footer.noTracking: No cookies set without your consent.

banner.title: We use cookies
banner.description: We use essential cookies to make our site work. With your permission, we'd also like to use analytics cookies to understand how you use our site and improve your experience.
banner.learnMore: Learn more about our cookie policy

necessary.title: Necessary Cookies
necessary.description: These cookies are required for the site to function. They cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors use our site. We use Google Analytics 4. No personal data is sent without your consent.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: These cookies are used to deliver relevant ads and track campaign effectiveness. Currently, we do not use any marketing cookies.

problemSolutions.title: Common Problems We Solve
problemSolutions.subtitle: If your operations look like this, we've built the playbook to fix it.

items.problem: "We have 4 systems and none of them talk to each other."
"Our entire order process lives in a spreadsheet."
"We bought an ERP 2 years ago and we're still not live."
"We don't know what's in our warehouse until we physically count it."
